description.zh-Hans: 对图像应用多种模糊效果：方框模糊、高斯模糊和运动模糊。采用可分离通道提升效率，使用环绕采样实现无缝平铺。
description.en: Applies various blur effects to an image: box blur, Gaussian blur, and motion blur. Uses separable passes for efficiency and wrapped sampling for seamless tiling.

triggers.zh-Hans: 模糊, 高斯模糊, 运动模糊, 径向模糊, 柔化
triggers.en: blur, gaussian blur, motion blur, radial blur, soften

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对背景应用高斯模糊以创建景深效果。
exampleUsage.en: Apply Gaussian blur to a background to create depth of field.
